useWhen: knowledge search over user documents
evidence-based or citation-attached generation
document corpus dependency (HWPX, docx, pdf, xlsx, pptx)
ontology, GraphRAG, or local corpus mentioned
mustNotInclude: blanket injection of all governance contracts
self-grading verifier when loop_policy is verified
private/confidential chunks routed to cloud hooks

useWhen: one installable worker
multiple skills inside one worker
self-evolving or research-refresh agent
one independent ownership boundary for memory/context, tools/permissions, and success criteria
many tools or skills but one worker owns the context
no routing, review handoff, or final synthesis requirement
no requested roster or team topology
mustNotInclude: multiple loose worker agent.md files (that is a team, not a single agent)

useWhen: multi-role team
orchestrator or HQ
roster, departments, debate, review gates, or parallel ownership
roles each need independent memory/context
roles require separated tools or permissions
role outputs need routing, review, or final synthesis
roster, desk, or parallel role ownership
produces/consumes handoff dependencies between roles
company-style topology
mustNotInclude: team collapsed into a lone helper
peer worker calls without HQ/project owner routing
release without eval and package verification

useWhen: existing local agent or prompt
existing Claude, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, or AGENTS.md repo
existing external public repo or zip
package for Agentlas, Codex plugin, Claude adapter, local install, or open source
